keywords.job: I am a trader. I sell potions brewed by the foremost alchemists of the land.
keywords.name: I am the mourned Mehkesh.
keywords.time: Time is but one of the hardships our mortal flesh has to endure.
keywords.temple: The temple spreads the word of our wise pharaoh.
keywords.pharaoh: The pharaoh alone has achieved godhood. But in his infinite mercy he chose to stay with his people to offer them guidance.
keywords.arkhothep: The pharaoh alone has achieved godhood. But in his infinite mercy he chose to stay with his people to offer them guidance.
keywords.ashmunrah: Even though his merciful son offered him undeath I doubt the old pharaoh will ever find his way to ascension.
keywords.scarab: The scarabs are more then just enormous insects. They are keepers of ancient secrets.
keywords.chosen: If we serve the pharaoh during our life time he might allow us to serve him in undeath. Only then can truly start our search for ascension.
keywords.tibia: One day our world will be freed from the false gods and accept the guidance of our pharaoh.
keywords.carlin: Those citys are only pawns of the false gods and their misguided priests.
keywords.thais: Those citys are only pawns of the false gods and their misguided priests.
keywords.edron: Those citys are only pawns of the false gods and their misguided priests.
keywords.venore: Those citys are only pawns of the false gods and their misguided priests.
keywords.kazordoon: The dwarves should know better then to praise the mortal essence of the elements.
keywords.dwarves: The dwarves should know better then to praise the mortal essence of the elements.
keywords.dwarfes: The dwarves should know better then to praise the mortal essence of the elements.
keywords.ab'dendriel: Elves are foolish and their obsession with life damns them to eternal death.
keywords.elves: Elves are foolish and their obsession with life damns them to eternal death.
keywords.elfes: Elves are foolish and their obsession with life damns them to eternal death.
keywords.darama: These are the lands of old secrets where the mortals will be shown the true revelations.
keywords.daraman: The prophet caught a glimpse of ascension, but he did not understand it.
keywords.ankrahmun: This city will remain as an eternal testament of our immortal pharaoh's power.
keywords.mortality: Only if we leave our mortality behind can we achieve salvation and ascension.
keywords.false: The false gods use our mortal flesh to enslave us.
keywords.gods: The false gods use our mortal flesh to enslave us.
keywords.ascension: Ascension is a difficult process. As long as we are mortal we are too distracted to even think about it.
keywords.Akh'rah: The Akh'rah Uthun is the union of that which once was separate.
keywords.Uthun: The Akh'rah Uthun is the union of that which once was separate.
keywords.Akh: Our Akh is our mortal flesh until it is replaced with something better - with an undead body.
keywords.undead: Undeath is the victory over the weaknesses of mortal flesh.
keywords.undeath: Undeath is the victory over the weaknesses of mortal flesh.
keywords.Rah: The Rah is our essence. The divine part in all of us.
keywords.uthun: The Uthun is the knowledge we gather in the course of time.
keywords.mourn: We are so pathetic in our mortality.
keywords.arena: The arena is a challenge for every skilled fighter.
keywords.palace: You can find the palace to the east of this market hall.
keywords.offer: I'm selling life and mana fluids.
keywords.goods: I'm selling life and mana fluids.
keywords.do: I'm selling life and mana fluids.
keywords.you: I'm selling life and mana fluids.
keywords.sell: I'm selling life and mana fluids.
keywords.have: I'm selling life and mana fluids.
keywords.deposit: I will pay you 5 gold for every empty vial. Ok?
keywords.vial: I will pay you 5 gold for every empty vial. Ok?
keywords.flask: I will pay you 5 gold for every empty vial. Ok?

texts: I am a trader. I sell potions brewed by the foremost alchemists of the land.

entries.response: Here you are. There is a deposit of 5 gold on the vial.
Come back, when you have enough money.
You don't have any empty vials.
Hmm, but please keep Tibia litter free.
